task: When two things try to save the user's library at the same instant, the file gets truncated and people permanently lose their playlists.
Downloaded songs are ending up world-readable in the shared container, so other apps on the phone can read the user's whole library; lock the file permissions down.
A race in the checkout flow occasionally charges a customer's card twice for the same order; track it down and stop the double billing.
Under load our sync job sometimes overwrites the newer copy of a document with a stale one, so users silently lose edits they made.
The password reset link never expires and can be reused indefinitely, so an old email lets anyone take over an account.
A migration we ran last night dropped the wrong column and we've started losing new signups; figure out what happened and recover the data.
Our API returns other users' personal data when you increment the id in the URL; there's no ownership check on the endpoint.
Refunds are being issued twice because the webhook retries aren't idempotent, and we're leaking money on every retry.
The nightly cleanup job is deleting production user uploads that are still referenced, and we can't get them back.
Session tokens aren't invalidated on logout, so a stolen token keeps working forever.
A deadlock in the payment processor is freezing checkout for everyone during peak hours; the store is effectively down.
We're writing customer credit-card numbers in plaintext into the application logs; scrub them and stop logging them.
Add a new payment method option (Apple Pay) to the existing checkout screen.
Refactor the authentication module to reduce duplication between the login and signup paths.
There's an occasional race condition in the progress-bar update that makes it flicker; smooth it out.
Rename the AuthManager class to SessionManager across the codebase.
Add a settings toggle that makes newly downloaded files private by default.
Write a database migration that adds a nullable nickname column to the users table.
Improve the encryption-key rotation section of the README so it's clearer.
The checkout page loads a bit slowly; profile it and speed it up.
The logout button is misaligned on small screens; fix the CSS.
Add a loading spinner to the payment button while the charge is processing.
Cache the user's library file in memory to speed up repeated reads.
Add unit tests for the checkout total calculation.
